mac: ⌘+K Z enters Zen mode — full screen, no distractions. Press Escape twice to exit.
windows: Ctrl+K Z enters Zen mode — full screen, no distractions. Press Escape twice to exit.
linux: Ctrl+K Z enters Zen mode — full screen, no distractions. Press Escape twice to exit.

mac: Sticky Scroll pins the current scope at the top of the editor. Toggle it in the View menu.
windows: Sticky Scroll pins the current scope at the top of the editor. Toggle it in the View menu.
linux: Sticky Scroll pins the current scope at the top of the editor. Toggle it in the View menu.

mac: ⇧+⌘+; focuses the breadcrumbs bar. Navigate your file structure without the mouse.
windows: Ctrl+Shift+; focuses the breadcrumbs bar. Navigate your file structure without the mouse.
linux: Ctrl+Shift+; focuses the breadcrumbs bar. Navigate your file structure without the mouse.

mac: Emmet works out of the box. Type div.container>ul>li*3 and press Tab.
windows: Emmet works out of the box. Type div.container>ul>li*3 and press Tab.
linux: Emmet works out of the box. Type div.container>ul>li*3 and press Tab.

mac: ⌘+, opens Settings. There are thousands to customize — use search to find them.
windows: Ctrl+, opens Settings. There are thousands to customize — use search to find them.
linux: Ctrl+, opens Settings. There are thousands to customize — use search to find them.

mac: ⌘+K ⌘+T opens the theme picker. Try a new color theme in seconds.
windows: Ctrl+K Ctrl+T opens the theme picker. Try a new color theme in seconds.
linux: Ctrl+K Ctrl+T opens the theme picker. Try a new color theme in seconds.

mac: Settings Sync keeps your config consistent across machines. Enable it from the accounts menu.
windows: Settings Sync keeps your config consistent across machines. Enable it from the accounts menu.
linux: Settings Sync keeps your config consistent across machines. Enable it from the accounts menu.

mac: ⌘+K V opens a side-by-side Markdown preview. Edit and preview at the same time.
windows: Ctrl+K V opens a side-by-side Markdown preview. Edit and preview at the same time.
linux: Ctrl+K V opens a side-by-side Markdown preview. Edit and preview at the same time.

mac: Drag an editor tab out of the window to open it in a separate floating window.
windows: Drag an editor tab out of the window to open it in a separate floating window.
linux: Drag an editor tab out of the window to open it in a separate floating window.

mac: ⌘+K ⌘+S opens the Keyboard Shortcuts editor. Remap anything to your liking.
windows: Ctrl+K Ctrl+S opens the Keyboard Shortcuts editor. Remap anything to your liking.
linux: Ctrl+K Ctrl+S opens the Keyboard Shortcuts editor. Remap anything to your liking.
